revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{各世紀アジアの軍人}} [[19世紀]]アジアの軍人のカテゴリ。[[江戸時代]]に活躍した[[武士]]を除く。これに該当するものは「[[:Category:江戸時代の武士]]」へ。 {{デフォルトソート:19くんしん}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{各世紀アジアの軍人}} {{citation needed|19くんしん}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:19世紀アジアの軍人]]}} {{translated page|ja|19世紀アジアの軍人|2=Category:19世紀アジアの軍人|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:19世紀アジアの軍人|version=92954248}} [[Category:19th-century Asian people]] [[Category:19th-century military personnel]] [[Category:Asian Military Personnel by Century]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tōgō_Heihachirō]] [[ja:Category:19世紀アジアの軍人]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Tōgō_Heihachirō]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
